case_title: BRADY PLUMBING WORKS ET AL VS. LINDA L. BAUMAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY GERALD BRADY, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS CEO FOR BRADY PLUMBING WORKS, AND DEFENDANT LINDA L. BAUMAN. STEPHANIE BORTOLIN, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFFS, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFFS' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRADY PLUMBING WORKS BRADY, GERALD W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUMAN, LINDA L. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $152.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,652.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,729.14 FILED BY BRADY PLUMBING WORKS BRADY, GERALD W. AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMAN, LINDA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRADY PLUMBING WORKS BRADY, GERALD W. AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMAN, LINDA L.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BRADY PLUMBING WORKS BRADY, GERALD W.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $72.00 SERVED AUG-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMAN, LINDA L.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRADY PLUMBING WORKS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
